response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including Java and enterprise frameworks, but his recent work has focused heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent tooling at Google and Meta. While he demonstrates strong technical skills and a passion for developer tooling, his direct experience with JVM internals, IDE development, and enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling is limited or outdated. His background in C/C++ and Java is promising but not recent or deeply engaged with the JVM ecosystem.
strengths: Strong general software engineering skills and problem-solving abilities across multiple languages and domains
Experience with developer tooling and automation (MCP, CI/CD, testing frameworks)
Proven track record in optimizing large-scale systems and contributing to open-source projects
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java/Kotlin and JVM internals (last significant Java work appears to be in 2015-2016)
No direct experience with IDE development or language tooling as described in the role
Primary expertise shifted toward TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling rather than enterprise JVM ecosystems

key_factors.factor: General software engineering and problem-solving skills
